body:
IMPORTANT — PROJECT DISCONTINUED

EasyPyDesktop has been officially discontinued as of March 26, 2026.

After two months of development and more than 20 updates, the decision was made to stop the project due to personal time constraints.

What this means:

- Your Pro license remains valid
- The application will continue to work as it is today
- No further updates or new features will be released
- No ongoing support will be provided
- New licenses are no longer available for purchase

Thank you to everyone who supported the project — your feedback helped shape every update.
